reviews.comment:
Mi tia es socia de ACA. La verdad el servicio es bueno, pero una vez que queres dar de baja, es muy complicado ya que llamas por teléfono u nunca tienen un asesor , escribis por WhatsApp y tampoco tienen asesor.! Muy complicado

(Translated by Google)
My aunt is a member of ACA. The service is good, but once you want to cancel your membership, it's very complicated. You call and they never have an advisor, you message them on WhatsApp and they don't have an advisor either! Very complicated.
